examples: The Yangjingou scheelite occurs in Wudaogou Group.
The formation of scheelite deposit has an intimate relationship with amphibole-schist.
Diluted nitric acid is used as a selective solvent to separate scheelite from wolframite.
We add WO3 (usually from scheelite) to iron to make ferrotungsten, or V2O5 to iron to make ferrovanadium which we then add to the steel.
